title: alyssum montanum subsp. arenarium
intro: Alyssum montanum subsp. arenarium, also known as mountain alyssum, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of mountain alyssum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. This plant is also known for its potential health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Mountain alyssum is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in traditional folk medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
